hourly.summary: The posts show mixed football-related content - some discussing Arsenal's defensive style and set-piece strength, while others mention upcoming matches and youth team results. There's a defensive tone about Arsenal's playing style being criticized, but also excitement about potential results.

daily.summary: Arsenal fans are experiencing an extremely positive period, riding high on their title charge with dominant performances and mounting pressure on rivals. The mood is electric with confidence in Arteta's system and mounting anticipation of silverware, though there's some acknowledgment that the football isn't always aesthetically pleasing.

weekly.summary: The weekly sentiment shows a volatile trend, starting with high euphoria following the North London derby win, then gradually declining through cautious optimism and distraction, before ending with anxious tension after the Chelsea match. Fans experienced dramatic emotional swings from celebration to frustration, reflecting the psychological toll of tight title race fixtures.
